María Antonieta fallece después de un tiempo y su hija queda totalmente sola. Por suerte para ella, Chabela Soriano, una vieja amiga de su madre, la hospeda en su casa junto a sus dos hijos.

programme.title: Amor Secreto
programme.desc: Asesinan a dos reclusas en la cárcel donde está Virginia. Jimena se entera de esto y va a la cárcel, junto con Carlos Ernesto, quién la sigue, y ella termina confesando que recibió una llamada de alguien que ofrecía asesinar a Virginia. La directora de la cárcel termina deteniendo a Jimena. Felipe va a la casa de los Ferrándiz para avisarle a Irene de lo sucedido en la cárcel y Agustina sorprende a Felipe y a Irene abrazándose. La acusa con Leandro, pero este toma partido por Irene y echa de la casa a Agustina. Ella le pide ayuda a su sobrino Leo ofreciéndole a cambio revelarle un secreto familiar.

programme.title: Entre Tu Amor y Mi Amor
programme.desc: Columba y Raúla discuten acerca de la escapada de Sol con Alejandro. Mientras tanto, Sol y Alejandro se besan en un lugar remoto. Sol lo rechaza delicadamente y Alejandro decide que deben volver y respetar la decisión de ella. Don Eloy le informa a Maricielo que ha pagado la deuda y que la casa donde vive su familia ahora le pertenece. Alicia va a provocar a Carlos a su estudio y luego lo lleva hasta la prisión donde él le informa a su madre que saldrá en libertad.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una asistente de un grupo juvenil de la iglesia desaparece a bordo de un crucero. ¿Podría alguien tener información sobre lo que sucedió? ¿Alguien está ocultando detalles importantes que puedan llevar a su paradero?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un crucero de luna de miel sale mal cuando se afirma que la novia es arrojada desde un balcón en medio de la noche. Pero cuando el informe del clima para la noche no muestra viento, comienza una investigación por asesinato.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Unas vacaciones sorpresa en un crucero para una pareja de esposos de Olympia, Washington, terminan con uno de ellos cayendo por la borda. ¿Fue venganza, celos o un impulso asesino en alta mar?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un padre y una hija abordan un crucero en alta mar, pero cuando el papá desaparece una noche, la familia se queda preguntándose qué le sucedió al hombre.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un exitoso hombre de negocios realiza un crucero de lujo con dos de sus antiguos compañeros de clase. Cuando desaparece, todas las señales apuntan a juego sucio.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un 4 de julio en un crucero un pasajero desaparece momentos después de abandonar la pista de baile. Los detalles de lo que ocurrió esa noche siguen atormentando a familiares y amigos.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una escritora de moda aborda un crucero de Londres a Nueva York, pero termina obteniendo más de lo que esperaba. ¿Quién la mató? ¿Alguien a bordo sabe lo que sucedió?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una familia de cuatro personas realiza un crucero de ensueño, pero solo tres regresan a casa. Comienza su búsqueda desesperada por la hija desaparecida, con todas las señales apuntando a un secuestro.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una estudiante universitaria alemana que trabaja en un crucero desaparece en un puerto de Alaska. ¿Decidió ausentarse de sus responsabilidades o le aguardó un destino terrible en tierra?

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Para recaudar fondos para la casa de sus sueños en España, Gemma Dorman se convierte en escort. Pero su plan fracasa cuando Vikram Singh se obsesiona con ella y acecha tanto a Gemma como a su madre.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Originario de Nepal, Roshan Sah tenía un sueño americano: pasar el resto de su vida con una mujer de la que se había enamorado, pero ella no sentía lo mismo. ¿Hasta dónde estaba dispuesto a llegar Roshan?

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Cuando los intentos de Pawel de seducir a la adolescente Agata son recibidos con aprensión, su interés por Agata resulta mortal.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: La trabajadora estudiante Leslie Pinkston se toma una noche libre para conocer a William Gardener, un hombre que conoce de la escuela. Pero pronto descubre que William no es el buen tipo que parece ser.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Lorin LaFave nunca podría haber imaginado que el encuentro en línea de su hijo de 14 años con un ciberacosador adolescente conduciría a su asesinato.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: John McFarlane, un carnicero, conoce a Mary en el gimnasio. Obsesionado y socialmente torpe, cree en una relación inexistente, y cuando lo rechaza, comienza su venganza.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Después de ser amenazada a punta de pistola por su violento novio, Nadia Ezaldein, estudiante de derecho de 22 años, finalmente reúne el coraje para poner fin a su relación abusiva. Pero esto es sólo el comienzo de la pesadilla de Nadia.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Después de conocer a Alissa Blanton en un Hooters en Florida, Roger Troy se convence de que pagó por la joven. Pronto, su delirio se convierte en una obsesión mortal.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Desde el momento en que Stephen Morgan ve por primera vez a Johanna Jinich en su curso de verano compartido en la Universidad de Nueva York, su vida corre peligro por su profundo odio racial.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Incluso después de ser puesta bajo protección de testigos, Lea Garafalo teme represalias por parte de su violento marido, afiliado a la mafia.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: Para recaudar fondos para la casa de sus sueños en España, Gemma Dorman se convierte en escort. Pero su plan fracasa cuando Vikram Singh se obsesiona con ella y acecha tanto a Gemma como a su madre.

programme.desc: Cuando los intentos de Pawel de seducir a la adolescente Agata son recibidos con aprensión, su interés por Agata resulta mortal.

programme.title: Acosadores que Matan
programme.desc: La trabajadora estudiante Leslie Pinkston se toma una noche libre para conocer a William Gardener, un hombre que conoce de la escuela. Pero pronto descubre que William no es el buen tipo que parece ser.

programme.title: Bissau Way
programme.desc: Guinea-Bisáu, un pequeño país de África Occidental con la costa más cercana a América Latina, se ha convertido en la puerta de entrada por excelencia del tráfico de drogas en el continente. "Bissau Way" sigue el rastro de la red criminal de cocaína desde Sinaloa hasta las paradisíacas islas Bijagós. Una búsqueda por entender cómo las grandes redes del narcotráfico se han asentado en este corredor y cómo su mercancía termina en Europa.

programme.title: Parejas Criminales
programme.desc: El examinador forense de escritura SC Leung nos muestra cómo distinguir entre estilos de escritura únicos y detectar un fraude.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Antiguos compañeros universitarios se abordan un crucero, entre ellos uno que es un excéntrico coleccionista de cuchillos. Cuando alguien termina apuñalado, todas las miradas se dirigen al coleccionista y su comportamiento extraño.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una experta en redess sociales, quien busca popularidad viajando en crucero, es brutalmente asesinada en una cabina de clase baja, las preguntas giran en torno a quién podría haber cometido tal crimen en su contra.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Los recién casados abordan un crucero, pero una noche uno de ellos desaparece. Un toldo manchado de sangre es la única pista del destino de un joven, dejando más preguntas que respuestas sobre lo que sucedió.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un granjero y su esposa toman un crucero para celebrar su trabajo y buena fortuna. Pero de pronto todo cambia y los amigos que están a bordo celebrando con ellos ahora ayudan en la búsqueda del granjero, quien ha desaparecido en el mar.

programme.title: Evolution of Violence
programme.desc: Guatemala. La guerra terminó hace mucho tiempo. Aunque la gente quiere olvidarlo, la violencia continúa. Cada día, los periodistas informan sobre el próximo asesinato y los trabajadores sociales ayudan a los familiares de los asesinados. La sociedad sufre las consecuencias de los 36 años de guerra civil. Se encuentran fosas comunes en las montañas, ex rebeldes lloran a sus camaradas y un criminal de guerra tiene pesadillas sobre las cosas que ha hecho.

programme.title: Enfermeros que Matan
programme.desc: Utilizando el acceso exclusivo a ocho horas de entrevistas, testimonios de investigadores de la policía y reconstrucciones dramáticas, en este programa se cuenta la escalofriante historia de la enfermera Beverley Allitt.

programme.title: Enfermeros que Matan
programme.desc: ¿Era uno de los suyos - una enfermera de Lufkin, una asesina en serie? Acceso exclusivo a entrevistas policiales, testimonios de investigadores y reconstrucciones dramáticas de hechos reales

programme.title: Enfermeros que Matan
programme.desc: Charles Cullen fue un enfermero que se cree mató a más de 300 pacientes. Los expertos analizan las acciones y el motivo de este insidioso asesino en serie.

programme.title: El Tercer Reich en Color
programme.desc: Las imágenes del Tercer Reich en la memoria de generaciones siempre se conservan en blanco y negro. Pero ocultas en archivos fílmicos y colecciones privadas, también se han conservado imágenes completamente diferentes, en color. Tomadas en las playas de Normandía y en sencillos festivales folclóricos, documentan las atrocidades de la Wehrmacht durante la guerra y la vida en la granja de montaña de Hitler, y aportan una realidad opresiva a las imágenes del criminal régimen nazi.

programme.title: El Tercer Reich en Color
programme.desc: Las imágenes del Tercer Reich en la memoria de generaciones siempre se conservan en blanco y negro. Pero ocultas en archivos fílmicos y colecciones privadas, también se han conservado imágenes completamente diferentes, en color. Tomadas en las playas de Normandía y en sencillos festivales folclóricos, documentan las atrocidades de la Wehrmacht durante la guerra y la vida en la granja de montaña de Hitler, y aportan una realidad opresiva a las imágenes del criminal régimen nazi.

programme.title: El Tercer Reich en Color
programme.desc: Las imágenes del Tercer Reich en la memoria de generaciones siempre se conservan en blanco y negro. programme.title: Seré asesinado
programme.desc: En mayo de 2009, el acaudalado abogado Rodrigo Rosenberg fue asesinado mientras paseaba en bicicleta por la Ciudad de Guatemala, un lugar con una alta tasa de homicidios. Antes de morir, se sintió amenazado, creyendo que lo matarían, especialmente tras el asesinato de su amante. Grabó un video acusando al presidente, que casi derrocó al gobierno. Una investigación sobre su caso reveló verdades impactantes.

programme.title: Parejas Criminales
programme.desc: El examinador forense de escritura SC Leung nos muestra cómo distinguir entre estilos de escritura únicos y detectar un fraude.

programme.desc: Las imágenes del Tercer Reich en la memoria de generaciones siempre se conservan en blanco y negro. Pero ocultas en archivos fílmicos y colecciones privadas, también se han conservado imágenes completamente diferentes, en color. Tomadas en las playas de Normandía y en sencillos festivales folclóricos, documentan las atrocidades de la Wehrmacht durante la guerra y la vida en la granja de montaña de Hitler, y aportan una realidad opresiva a las imágenes del criminal régimen nazi.

programme.title: El Tercer Reich en Color
programme.desc: Las imágenes del Tercer Reich en la memoria de generaciones siempre se conservan en blanco y negro. Pero ocultas en archivos fílmicos y colecciones privadas, también se han conservado imágenes completamente diferentes, en color. programme.title: Seré asesinado
programme.desc: En mayo de 2009, el acaudalado abogado Rodrigo Rosenberg fue asesinado mientras paseaba en bicicleta por la Ciudad de Guatemala, un lugar con una alta tasa de homicidios. Antes de morir, se sintió amenazado, creyendo que lo matarían, especialmente tras el asesinato de su amante. Grabó un video acusando al presidente, que casi derrocó al gobierno. Una investigación sobre su caso reveló verdades impactantes.

programme.title: Parejas Criminales
programme.desc: El examinador forense de escritura SC Leung nos muestra cómo distinguir entre estilos de escritura únicos y detectar un fraude.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una joven y vivaz artista que trabaja en un crucero de lujo atrae a tantos admiradores que comienzan a surgir celos. Después de una noche de socialización, no se presenta al ensayo. ¿Qué sucedió realmente tras la puerta cerrada de su camarote?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una terapeuta conocida por su actitud cariñosa se va de crucero con su marido para intentar arreglar su matrimonio, que está pasando por un mal momento. Por desgracia, su semana a solas acaba de forma trágica cuando ella cae desde la cubierta superior. ¿Es solo un accidente o ha pasado algo más siniestro?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una viuda millonaria y su hija adolescente se embarcan juntas en un crucero de cinco estrellas. Pero en una de las muchas paradas del viaje, los miembros de la tripulación hacen un espeluznante descubrimiento cuando encuentran el cadáver de la viuda metido en la maleta de su hija.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una pareja de recién casados recién jubilados se embarca en su tercer crucero tropical en menos de un año. La feliz y divertida pareja disfruta de las aventuras y el romanticismo de esta nueva etapa cuando ocurre una tragedia y los encuentran muertos en su camarote.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Dos novios del instituto, que se reencuentran después de 30 años, celebran sus cumpleaños haciendo un crucero juntos. Después de una noche de copas durante una excursión, uno de ellos aparece golpeado y estrangulado hasta la muerte. ¿Fue culpa de un escorpión empapado en alcohol?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Cuando a unos recién casados se les impide desembarcar en una excursión de un día por sospecha de falsificación de pasaportes, su relación comienza a desmoronarse. La bigamia conduce a un derramamiento de sangre. ¿Y quiénes serán las víctimas cuando se introduzca de contrabando una pistola a bordo?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Dos días después de cumplir 50 años, una profesora de trabajo social se embarca en un crucero de cumpleaños con su novio de toda la vida. Pero poco después de que el barco zarpe del puerto, ella sufre una trágica caída que le cuesta la vida. Las autoridades consideran que se trata de un accidente. Sin embargo, meses más tarde, el novio es acusado de homicidio en segundo grado.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un exmarido y una exmujer deciden reavivar su relación con un crucero. Pero, tras varios días a bordo del barco, la exmujer es dada por desaparecida. Más tarde, su cuerpo aparece flotando en el mar. La autopsia revela que fue asesinada.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece tras el segundo día del crucero vacacional de la familia. Tras una larga investigación, la policía señala al marido como sospechoso. ¿Qué ocurrió realmente?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Tras una noche loca en un crucero de fiesta, una joven y bella aspirante a actriz aparece muerta, pero las circunstancias que rodean su muerte son tan misteriosas como trágicas. ¿Podría su novio saber más de lo que dice?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un matrimonio se gasta una fortuna para celebrar su aniversario de boda por todo lo alto con un crucero único en la vida. Sin embargo, un grupo de terroristas a bordo del barco se ve obligado a tomar el control del buque después de que un mozo de acoplamiento descubra su alijo de armas.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una pareja que rompe y vuelve constantemente se embarca en un crucero de una semana para intentar reconstruir su relación. Todo va bien hasta que ocurre lo impensable y uno de ellos desaparece por la borda. ¿Fue un terrible accidente o un asesinato a sangre fría?

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Una escritora se va de crucero con su marido para celebrar su primer aniversario. Tras su desaparición, las cámaras de seguridad muestran cómo cae por la borda, lo que lleva a todos a preguntarse quién o qué la empujó.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Un crucero se ve sacudido por una fuerte tormenta y cuatro amigos que viajan juntos buscan refugio en sus camarotes. Pero puede que una de las parejas no sea tan feliz como parece. ¿Cuál de ellos está a punto de sufrir un cambio fatal de destino?

programme.title: Parejas Criminales
programme.desc: El examinador forense de escritura SC Leung nos muestra cómo distinguir entre estilos de escritura únicos y detectar un fraude.

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros

programme.title: Asesinatos en Cruceros
programme.desc: Cuando a unos recién casados se les impide desembarcar en una excursión de un día por sospecha de falsificación de pasaportes, su relación comienza a desmoronarse. La bigamia conduce a un derramamiento de sangre. ¿Y quiénes serán las víctimas cuando se introduzca de contrabando una pistola a bordo?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It’s been more than two months since a young mother of two, Susan Powell, vanished without a trace. Susan’s husband, Josh, is now a person of interest in this case but her family claims he refuses to cooperate with police. Dr. Phil speaks with the missing woman's parents, Chuck and Judy. Learn what they have to say about what they conclude is odd behavior of Susan’s husband and why say they fear for their grandchildren. A Dr. Phil field producer travels to the camp area where Josh allegedly took his sons after midnight the night Susan disappeared. Don’t miss what she discovers! And, legal analyst Lisa Bloom weighs in on this case. Next, Ed Smart, whose daughter, Elizabeth, was kidnapped and found, knows what it’s like to be a person of interest like Josh. Hear what he says. Plus, a father whose daughter, Kimberly Medina, has been missing for 14 years shares the mistakes he thinks he’s made and has a strong message for Chuck and Judy about their grandchildren. Go behind the headlines in this heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elizabeth and her husband, Bob, claim that Elizabeth’s 20-year-old daughter, Ali, is a “spoiled brat,” who refuses to go to college or get a job, has trashed their house and also steals from them. Dr. Phil has some tough questions for Ali about her behavior -- and for the parents, who admit they’ve enabled their daughter. Can Ali learn to stand on her own two feet?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two families desperate to find their missing children ask Dr. Phil for help. Two-year-old Bianca disappeared while in the care of her father. He says she was taken when he was carjacked. Was he involved in her disappearance? And, Josh hasn’t seen his son, Trenton, since he was 2 years old, more than five years ago. Did the boy's mother, who died by suicide, take clues with her to the grave?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They borrow money and don't pay you back. They're unemployed and never pay rent. If you're tired of a loved one's freeloading ways, Dr. Phil has advice for getting the handouts to stop. Ryan, 29, says he's living the life of "a starving artist," but his sisters say he's just a moocher. He even tries to mooch off Dr. Phil! Then, Jennell says her husband has turned her into a moocher by forcing her to ask her own mother to pay their bills. Will he give up his dreams of playing poker professionally or keep gambling by living off their savings and watching his marriage slip away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: There comes a point when every child must grow up and face life on their own. For today’s guests, that time has come and gone and they want stay with Mom and Dad! You’ll meet Ryan, whose father says he’s borrowed over $10,000, and has trouble standing on his own two feet. And watch as Dr. Phil gives another young adult the tools she needs to create a life of her own. Find out what needs to happen before your offspring fly the coop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Witness the “boomerang effect...” Dr. Phil talks to parents whose adult children keep coming back to live with, and off of them. One couple says their sons refuse to move out even though they are both almost 30-years-old. One 25- year-old is unemployed, has had 16 jobs in seven years, lives with his mother and even took her credits cards to charge up two thousand dollars worth of “stuff.” Dr. Phil helps these adult children address their issues so they can stop their destructive patterns.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It’s been more than three years since 7-year-old Kyron Horman disappeared -- and the case still remains unsolved. Kyron’s divorced parents, Desiree and Kaine, come together in an exclusive interview with Dr. Phil. Hear why they say they believe Kyron’s stepmother, Terri, may know more that she’s admitting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What creates a monster? As the popular new Netflix series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story pushes the heinous crimes of the notorious serial killer back into the spotlight, what can we learn about what may have made him the evil he was? Do chilling home videos of Jeffrey Dahmer as a little boy show an innocent child before he became evil? Or, were the signs already there? His parents reveal the red flags they say they missed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The new series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story may have landed the number one spot on Netflix, but it wasn’t popular with everyone. Angry family members of Dahmer’s victims say the controversial drama re-traumatized them and romanticized the notorious serial killer. You’ve seen Hollywood’s version. Today, Dr. Phil is telling the real story and meeting the real people who say they knew the real monster that was Jeffrey Dahmer. In an exclusive interview, hear from the sister of one victim who says the series glorified the man she calls “Satan,” as well as two men who say they were tortured and terrorized by Dahmer and survived.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What creates a monster? As the popular new Netflix series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story pushes the heinous crimes of the notorious serial killer back into the spotlight, what can we learn about what may have made him the evil he was? Do chilling home videos of Jeffrey Dahmer as a little boy show an innocent child before he became evil? Or, were the signs already there? His parents reveal the red flags they say they missed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The new series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story may have landed the number one spot on Netflix, but it wasn’t popular with everyone. Angry family members of Dahmer’s victims say the controversial drama re-traumatized them and romanticized the notorious serial killer. You’ve seen Hollywood’s version. Today, Dr. Phil is telling the real story and meeting the real people who say they knew the real monster that was Jeffrey Dahmer. In an exclusive interview, hear from the sister of one victim who says the series glorified the man she calls “Satan,” as well as two men who say they were tortured and terrorized by Dahmer and survived.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 1985, Rachel’s 14-year-old sister, Lori, was found murdered, and Rachel is desperate to prove her claim that Lori’s ex-boyfriend, Walt, killed the teen and got away with it -- an accusation he vehemently denies. Walt was initially tried for the murder, but the case was dismissed after the trial resulted in a hung jury -- and he says Rachel needs to stop pointing the finger at him and move on. Tensions run high when Rachel confronts Walt on Dr. Phil’s stage. Where was Walt the night of Lori’s death? And, how does he explain allegations that he has made inconsistent statements to police? Then, Walt says he passed a polygraph in 1985, clearing his name. Dr. Phil calls on polygraph expert Jack Trimarco to examine the results -- what are his thoughts? Plus, don’t miss Part 2, when Walt takes a new polygraph test -- what will the results reveal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Imagine discovering that your next-door neighbor owns over 200 cats. Ray and Dennis never thought their neighbor, Kristy, would let her pet collection get that big. Once friends, the three are now in a nasty and vindictive war because of the felines. Ray and Dennis say Kristy's property is one big, disgusting litter box, and they want Kristy to get rid of her cats. Kristy says she'll never part with her "cat sanctuary." Are Ray and Dennis playing dirty in order to run Kristy out of town? When is it too much, and where do you draw the line in the litter box? Then, Mike says his wife, Lori, keeps everything from used envelopes to empty food jars and medicine bottles, because she "might need it" in the future. He is ready to take desperate measures to put a stop to this. Lori says the thought of throwing her stuff out is her worst nightmare. Is Mike guilty of making nasty bribes to get his wife to change? What's really behind Lori's habit for hoarding?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracy is a successful, working actress who has appeared on many daytime soap operas including The Bold and The Beautiful and The Young and The Restless. She wrote into the show urgently seeking Dr. Phil’s help for her real-life drama of her hoarding 71-year-old-mother, Robin, who could be evicted from her home at any minute. Tracy claims her mother’s homes have always been filled with filth, chaos, and animals, and she’s never taken responsibility for the conditions Tracy lived in growing up. Tracy says she feels like the child of a drug addict, except the drug is hoarding, and she’s looking for Dr. Phil’s help to truly change her mom’s behavior before she’s back in another house of filth again. Robin says she knows she needs help with her hoarding, but the idea of getting rid of her possessions gives her anxiety. She says she’s ready to fix herself with the help of Dr. Phil, and this show is an answer to her prayers.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2011, Robyn Gardner vanished while on vacation in Aruba with her companion, Gary Giordano, who was considered the prime suspect but was never charged in connection with her disappearance. Dr. Phil sits down with Gary to sort through the details and accusations in search of answers. What happened to Robyn Gardner? And, will Gary -- who maintains his innocence -- take a polygraph test?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The 1957 kidnapping and murder of Maria Ridulph went cold for 55 years, until Jack McCullough, once known as John Tessier, was arrested and eventually convicted -- despite maintaining his innocence. Dr. Phil speaks to family members on both sides. Could McCullough have been wrongfully convicted?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Rachel, who accuses Walt of murdering her 14-year-old sister in 1985, despite his vehement denial. Walt claims Rachel might have been involved in her sister’s death -- an accusation she strongly denies. Both agree to take a polygraph test -- what will the results reveal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Where is 7-year-old Kyron Horman? The little boy went missing six years ago after his school science fair. His stepmother, Terri Horman, gives her version of what Kyron's parents have called Terri’s “bizarre behavior” after her stepson vanished.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Sheena Morris was found hanged in a Florida hotel room on New Year's Day 2009, her death was ruled a suicide. But the 22-year-old's parents, Kelly and David, say they believe their daughter was murdered, and have since been working relentlessly to reopen the investigation into her death, which is now under review. On Dr. Phil's stage, they come face to face with the man they believe killed Sheena -- her 48-year-old fiancé, Joe. Were there clues missed in the original investigation? Then, Joe says he believed Sheena was suicidal in the days leading up to her death -- so why did he leave her alone in the hotel room after a heated argument? Does his story add up? Joe takes a polygraph to prove his innocence. Don't miss the shocking results!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The family of 19-year-old Jake Limberios continues to search for answers surrounding his death in March 2012. Who fired the gunshot that ended his life? Brittany and Will, who witnessed the shooting, say Jake, a gun enthusiast, accidentally shot himself in the head. Although the coroner ruled his death a suicide, Jake’s parents, Mike and Shannon, say their son, a young father, never would’ve taken his own life. Left with so many unanswered questions, Jake’s parents had his body exhumed and autopsied by renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht, who concluded that Jake’s cause of death wasn’t suicide. Dr. Phil speaks with Dr. Wecht via satellite -- hear why he says Jake couldn’t have shot himself. Plus, Brittany and Will say they sympathize with Jake’s parents but are tired of being under suspicion and agree to take polygraph tests to prove they’re not hiding any details about Jake’s death. What will the results reveal? And, Mike and Shannon say their marriage has grown strained since their son’s death -- can they learn to come together and find peace after such a painful loss?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: On March 2, 2012, 19-year-old Jacob “Jake” Limberios was fatally shot in the head in the presence of three friends. The coroner ruled his death a suicide -- but Jake’s parents, Mike and Shannon, say it doesn’t add up. They claim there was no investigation into Jake’s death, no evidence collected and no autopsy performed before Jake's death was ruled a suicide -- and they refuse to believe their son would take his own life. Jake’s family say a lot of questions remain unanswered, including: Who fired the shot? Two witnesses, Brittany and Will, adamantly maintain that Jake accidentally shot himself, but Mike and Shannon say their son knew how to handle guns safely and that the evidence doesn’t support that conclusion. Mike takes Dr. Phil cameras to the scene of the shooting to demonstrate why he believes that Jake was shot by someone else in the room. And, Brittany and Will face Mike and Shannon on Dr. Phil’s stage in an attempt to clear the cloud of suspicion that they say still follows them as a result of Mike and Shannon’s allegations. When offered a chance to take a polygraph test, will they accept? Don’t miss this compelling two-part mystery.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It’s been three years since Glenn Lemoine’s body was found floating in a canal, and his death remains a mystery. His family wants answers -- and they’re pointing the finger at each other. Two agree to take polygraph tests -- what will the results reveal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil explores potential new clues in the separate cold cases of Ashley Summers and Michelle Parker, who have been missing for several years. What happened to these women? Plus, “Homeless Joe” returns to Dr. Phil -- how is he now?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mike and Vicki say their 37-year-old son, Ryan, was once making millions running a successful real estate company, but for the past three months, he has been living in their garage, on their dime, along with his 24-year-old girlfriend, Rachel. The parents claim Ryan is a “freeloader” who sleeps all day, acts entitled, picks fights and even leaves them to care for his 5-year-old son. Ryan admits things are chaotic in his life but insists it’s not all his fault. Why does he say his parents are partly to blame for his business failing? Dr. Phil has some tough questions for Ryan about his behavior -- does he take any accountability? And, hear from Rachel -- is she happy with their living situation? Plus, Ryan isn’t the only one staying with mom and dad -- you won’t believe how many mouths Mike and Vicki say they are feeding! How can the parents stop the bleeding and take back control of their lives? And, is Ryan ready to step up to the plate and work toward living on his own?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Dr. Phil exclusive. A beautiful teen goes missing on spring break. Now, 7 years later, shocking new allegations – was Brittanee kidnapped, killed, and thrown into a gator pit? Her family gives their first interview since hearing the nightmarish details about what a jailhouse informant claims happened to their daughter. Plus, hear what a surprising guest has to say – do they know something about Brittanee’s murder?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alex says he will do absolutely anything to live his “bad and boujee” lifestyle. He admits he lies, cheats, and steals thousands of dollars from friends, family, and even strangers, just so he can live a lifestyle which includes shopping, tanning, and getting his hair done. Alex says he wants to become famous for his “twerking videos,” but until then, he believes his family should be taking care of him because he’s “just 26-year-old!” Alex’s mother, Kimberly, and sister, Elizabeth, say nothing about Alex’s life is glamorous, and claim he's addicted to drugs and a criminal. They claim Alex shows no remorse for any of his actions, even though he has stolen so much from his mother that she claims she will be homeless within the year! Can Dr. Phil get through to Alex? Will Alex ever change his “bad and boujee” ways? Find out!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Where is 7-year-old Kyron Horman? The little boy vanished six years ago without a trace after his school science fair. His parents claim his stepmother, Terri, knows what happened to him. Terri Horman tells her side of the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cindy and Jim say they are fed up with their 35-year-old son, Brandon. They say he’s a moocher who refuses to get job, wears superhero costumes on a daily basis, and has caused $15,000 in damages to their property. Brandon says his parents don’t understand how his mind works. He admits to wearing superhero costumes and going on nightly “Batman” vigilante missions. Brandon says he also created a rapper persona named “Ceeza Caprice” and considers himself a “God MC” who can rap to any beat. Brandon’s sister, Harmony, says she blames her parents for Brandon’s behavior. She says they enable Brandon. She claims Brandon is a manipulator who sees it as a challenge to live off others.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It’s been more than two months since a young mother of two, Susan Powell, vanished without a trace. Susan’s husband, Josh, is now a person of interest in this case but her family claims he refuses to cooperate with police. Dr. Phil speaks with the missing woman's parents, Chuck and Judy. Learn what they have to say about what they conclude is odd behavior of Susan’s husband and why say they fear for their grandchildren. A Dr. Phil field producer travels to the camp area where Josh allegedly took his sons after midnight the night Susan disappeared. Don’t miss what she discovers! And, legal analyst Lisa Bloom weighs in on this case. Next, Ed Smart, whose daughter, Elizabeth, was kidnapped and found, knows what it’s like to be a person of interest like Josh. Hear what he says. Plus, a father whose daughter, Kimberly Medina, has been missing for 14 years shares the mistakes he thinks he’s made and has a strong message for Chuck and Judy about their grandchildren. Go behind the headlines in this heartbreaking story.

programme.desc: Witness the “boomerang effect...” Dr. Phil talks to parents whose adult children keep coming back to live with, and off of them. One couple says their sons refuse to move out even though they are both almost 30-years-old. One 25- year-old is unemployed, has had 16 jobs in seven years, lives with his mother and even took her credits cards to charge up two thousand dollars worth of “stuff.” Dr. Phil helps these adult children address their issues so they can stop their destructive patterns.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It’s been more than three years since 7-year-old Kyron Horman disappeared -- and the case still remains unsolved. Kyron’s divorced parents, Desiree and Kaine, come together in an exclusive interview with Dr. Phil. Hear why they say they believe Kyron’s stepmother, Terri, may know more that she’s admitting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What creates a monster? As the popular new Netflix series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story pushes the heinous crimes of the notorious serial killer back into the spotlight, what can we learn about what may have made him the evil he was? Do chilling home videos of Jeffrey Dahmer as a little boy show an innocent child before he became evil? Or, were the signs already there? His parents reveal the red flags they say they missed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The new series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story may have landed the number one spot on Netflix, but it wasn’t popular with everyone. Angry family members of Dahmer’s victims say the controversial drama re-traumatized them and romanticized the notorious serial killer. You’ve seen Hollywood’s version. Today, Dr. Phil is telling the real story and meeting the real people who say they knew the real monster that was Jeffrey Dahmer. In an exclusive interview, hear from the sister of one victim who says the series glorified the man she calls “Satan,” as well as two men who say they were tortured and terrorized by Dahmer and survived.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Victims and survivors of Jeffrey Dahmer say they want people to see him for who he really was -- not the glamorized TV version. See a never-before-aired interview with Dahmer’s father and stepmother that sheds light on the monster behind the man. They provide chilling details about his bizarre childhood behaviors. Plus, the Netflix series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story pushed a decades-old story into today’s spotlight, some say giving it a 2022 “pop culture moment.” After the series debuted, Dahmer’s infamous glasses went up for sale for $150,000, and people dressed up as the notorious serial killer for Halloween. Has our culture’s obsession with true crime desensitized us?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Some believe self-censorship is a big problem today, particularly in light of the idea that someone can be "canceled" for their words -- blocked from having a prominent public platform or career for sharing their opinion. Dr. Phil interviews Nate, a former Idaho police officer, who claims he was fired after making a TikTok video about NBA superstar LeBron James that went viral and has been viewed over 4 million times. Nate explains how the fall-out from the video affected him and his family, too. Dr. Phil also speaks with conservative political commentator Tomi Lahren, who says she recently had to be protected by state police from student protestors at the University of New Mexico. Greg Lukianoff, president of the Foundation for Individual Rights and Expression, says he believes Americans have lost the ability to discuss their differences rationally. And, Dr. Shaun Harper, founder and Executive Director of the USC Race and Equity Center, says he is firmly against hate speech and feels people need to be more mindful about the effects of their words.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation continues with D’Andre, who blames his abusive relationship with his ex-girlfriend, Autumn, on her upbringing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Daniel Pelosi was convicted of second-degree murder in the slaying of investment banker and multimillionaire Ted Ammon -- the husband of his lover, Generosa. He is currently serving 25 years to life but now claims he is ready to explain what really happened the night of the murder. Dr. Phil visits Pelosi behind bars.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil’s guests say they’re not getting any younger, and the race is on to say “I do.” Sharon is 48 and says her biological clock is ticking away. She recently got engaged to a man whom she acknowledges is flawed, and she says her family doesn’t approve of her husband-to-be. Can she get them to accept her beau before they walk down the aisle, or do her relatives have a reason to be concerned? Then, Shea from the reality show Southern Belles: Louisville says that as she was planning her big day, she learned that her fiancé allegedly cheated. Now that the wedding is off, can Shea pick up the pieces and move on? Plus, a dating coach explains the biggest dating mistakes women make.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: For the first time, a woman meets her soon-to-be daughter-in-law, whom she has called manipulative, immoral and disrespectful.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In Part 3 of the Man Camp Series, couples fighting to save their marrages deal with family issues, infidelity, and unexpected visitors.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, will your financial problems be solved or can the money be more trouble than it’s worth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The contentious 2020 presidential election has shown that there’s a clear divide in America – half the country is celebrating, and the other half is angry – making the upcoming holiday season especially tricky to navigate. Instead of being a time of joy, celebration and giving thanks, many families are faced with the dilemma of how not to argue with their own spouses, children and parents about politics. Dr. Phil meets a Republican father, who is barely speaking to his Democrat daughter after an argument they had over Donald Trump. Then, Dr. Phil meets another father, a lifelong Democrat, who says he raised his son to be a free thinker ... but never imagined that he’d support Trump! The election is officially over, but the drama remains. What’s Dr. Phil’s advice on how to move forward post- election without turning holiday dinners with family into a war zone over politics? Tune in!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Laurie-Ann emailed Dr. Phil claiming she was robbed by her dangerous, narcissist ex-boyfriend and his new fiancée, Alison. She claims her ex, Michael, held her hostage for seven years. Laurie-Ann claims Michael and Alison are retaliating against her for breaking her silence and filing charges against Michael for domestic violence, emotional abuse, theft, and fraud. But Michael and Alison say Laurie-Ann is a liar who is always playing the victim. Michael says he never held her hostage; she only started to say that because he dumped her. Alison says she just wants Laurie-Ann to move on with her life, let them be happy, and stop stalking them. But Laurie-Ann says Alison doesn’t know how vindictive Michael really is and she claims he has turned everyone, including the police, against her. Laurie-Ann says she wants Dr. Phil to validate her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Phyllis and Barry say they're desperate to calm their violent 15-year-old son, Brandon, and turn to Dr. Phil for help. Their requests for Brandon to perform simple tasks such as brushing his teeth or bathing cause him to go into a rage, breaking things and punching holes in walls, and even chasing Phyllis with scissors. Barry says they walk on eggshells, waiting for Brandon’s next violent outburst and that every day he leaves the house worried that his wife may not be alive when he returns. What is at the root of Brandon's anger? Dr. Phil spends some one-on-one time with the young man to determine what’s driving his behavior. And, find out what Phyllis recently found in Brandon’s room that shocked her to her core.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents seek Dr. Phil's help for an out-of-control teen.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A mom is supposed to love and nurture her children, but what if she's too involved? Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling, manipulative and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration, not mourning. He claims she uses bribes to control his every move, including offering him $20,000 to divorce his first wife. Margaret admits that she can be pushy and difficult but says she just wants to see her son succeed in life. Is she really setting him up for failure? Does Reed really want to man-up and break free from his mother's grasp? And, is Margaret willing to let him go? Then, 35-year-old Anthony, star of the new TLC reality show Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home and letting his mom, Patti, wait on him hand and foot. How does Patti feel about their living arrangement? Will she ever kick Anthony out? Plus, hear how Anthony's lifestyle affects his dating life. If you know of a mother-son bond that's a little too close for comfort, don't miss this Dr. Phil. Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration. Margaret says she wants to see her son succeed - but is she setting him up for failure? Plus, 35-year-old Anthony, star of TLC's Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents say their daughter's home is unsafe for grandson.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every day, many teen girls fear for their lives because of obsessive, controlling and abusive boyfriends, and it’s another reason why Dr. Phil is so passionate about his campaign to End the Silence on Domestic Violence. Seventeen-year-old Samantha sent an urgent plea for help to Dr. Phil. She says her ex-boyfriend, Aaron, called her nonstop for weeks and sent her threatening text messages after she broke up with him. After Samantha changed her number, he began calling her mother repeatedly. Samantha says he showed up unannounced at her house and pounded on the door for 45 minutes while she cowered in a locked closet. She says she’s afraid Aaron could even kill her. Dr. Phil sits down with the two teens to help Samantha get her message to Aaron loud and clear. And, Tiffany, 20, has a cautionary tale of survival every teen needs to hear. It could save her life!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she’s not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace.Dr. Phil says Bridget is a parent in denial and in need of a wake-up call. He sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents Liz and Jim say their 16-year-old son, Nic, has a serious drug problem that has such a hold on him, they claim he even stole $75,000 in gold from his parents’ safe and spent it all on drugs! But, Liz says she is convinced that her husband is to blame. Liz accuses Jim of being a narcissist and misogynist, whose parenting philosophy is based on intimidation and abuse, and claims that is what drove their son to drugs. Jim denies Liz’s allegations, claiming she has gone to great lengths to paint him as a villain. He says she is the major problem, and calls her the world's lousiest parent and a doormat who helped enable Nic's deadly addictions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A man accuses his ex-wife and her new husband of killing his children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They’re self-absorbed, spoiled and entitled brats, otherwise known as Generation Me. MTV correspondent Kim Stolz recently hit the streets of New York to find out how the younger generation feels about this label. Don't miss the candid responses. Then, Bradley, 24, says he wants to be rich and drive a Lamborghini, but he only wants to put in 80 percent of the effort. He still relies on his mom, Christine, to pay his rent and other bills. Will Bradley learn to stand on his own two feet? Plus, Monica says her 18-year-old daughter, Courtney, is an “entitlement princess,” and she gives the teen money just to keep the peace. Will mom and daughter get a wake-up call? And Jean Twenge, author of Generation Me, reveals why many young people are narcissistic.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman says her ex-husband enables their daughter's addiction.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What’s a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does? Michelle says her husband, Jim, has controlled her for the 15 years that they’ve been together, and she’s fed up with his faultfinding. She says he tells her what to wear, how much she should eat, and even uses a GPS to track her whereabouts! Jim admits that his behavior is out of control and fears that he could be pushing his wife out the door. Why is he so critical of Michelle, and can Dr. Phil get the judgmental hubby to change his ways? Then, Sally says her husband, John, is so controlling that she spends most of her days picking up dust bunnies from the floor and only speaking when he allows her to. John says cleanliness is next to godliness and believes control is a matter of perception. See what causes him to go toe to toe with Dr. Phil! Will the couple get the help they’re seeking? It’s an explosive Dr. Phil you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A teen girl so obsessed with her on-again, off-again boyfriend that he claims she has become a stalker, forcing him to get a restraining order… for three years! Cristie says her 19-year-old daughter Corryn started dating 17-year-old Jack almost two years ago and every time they break up, Corryn becomes a “crazy ex-girlfriend.” Jack claims Corryn calls him hundreds of times a day, breaks into his house and hides behind the bushes to watch his every move, each time violating the restraining order. But Corryn says Jack plays games with her and lures her to him every time. Cristie and Jack’s mom, Brytt, say they’ve had it and want their teens’ relationship to end today -- but what does Corryn have to say about that? Can she stop obsessing over Jack, and will she keep a promise she made to Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A headline making story of a husband’s affair with a co-worker that led to murder. Now the wife and the mistress come face to face for the first time.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents suspect foul play in their daughter's alleged death by suicide.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet a “runaway bride” who’s already called off five weddings and she’s only 26! Then, meet another guest who’s frustrated because her fiancé won’t set a wedding date. He's canceled two previous engagements and says marriage "freaks him out." What does the future hold for these two? Plus, a heartbroken woman whose fiancé called the wedding off a month before her big day. Should she wait for him to come around? Find out what every bride needs to know before walking down the aisle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When he last appeared on Dr. Phil, Kip’s brazen and outrageous tirade toward his 17-year-old stepdaughter, Tory, shocked audience members and viewers. But the married father of two refused to back down. When Tory broke down in tears, Kip finally agreed to find a calmer way to express his frustration. Just weeks later, Tory’s mother, Vicky, says the surly relationship has not only gotten worse, the hostility has escalated, and her patience is running thin. She says both Tory and Kip refuse to seek help, and now there is a new bombshell that is making their home life virtually unbearable. What does Kip say is his biggest issue with his stepdaughter? And, will this family finally agree to accept help and repair what’s left of their relationship? Then, Joe, 34, became an instant father to two teenage daughters. One of the girls has run away, and the other feels that he treats her like a slave. Can they resolve their disputes and come together as one? (FOLLOW UP FROM 9093)

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every bride wants to shine on her special day -- from wearing the perfect gown to hosting the most extravagant reception. But what happens when the dream of the perfect wedding turns into a nightmare? Janae knows about this pain firsthand. Her husband, Michael, got so drunk before the ceremony that he passed out cold after saying “I do” and didn’t wake up until the next day! Janae attended the reception by herself and spent her wedding night with her bridesmaids at a hotel. Their wedding from hell took place two years ago, but she still tears up at the memory of that fateful day. Can she ever forgive Michael's mishaps, or is he doomed to the doghouse forever? Then, Angela is a self-professed bridezilla who makes no excuses for her demanding ways. She even created a newsletter for her bridesmaids with the rules and regulations they must follow to participate in her wedding! Her sister and maid of honor, Vanessa, worries that Angela's nitpicking will cause her fiancé, Marvin, to run for the hills. What's behind Angela's controlling behavior, and is she headed for heartache on her special day?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: He’s a tough-guy afraid of loosing his freedom. She’s been through two ugly divorces. So when the “M” word comes up, they head for the hills. Join these commitment-challenged singles as Dr. Phil uncovers the reasons why they won’t take the plunge. You’ll also meet a man who, after a four years in a loving relationship, doesn’t see the need to get married. To him it’s just a piece of paper. To her it’s a lot more. Find out if it’s really a “deal breaker.”

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Em says her husband, Shawn, has cheated on her with at least 78 women -- so why does she keep taking him back? Shawn admits to at least 20 affairs but says it’s his wife’s fault that he strays.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christina, 21, and her younger sister, Carlie, 13, say they had a close relationship with their father, Michael, until two years ago when he decided to transition to a female. Michael was a police officer, soldier and loving parent who lived his life as a male for 40 years. Now, he wants his daughters to call him Mom, because he says Dad is gone, but they refuse. Michael, who prefers to be called Kayla, says she wants to explain to her daughters why she's living as a woman, but they've never given her the chance. The last time Christina saw her father was two years ago when he showed up at her work in lace and blue jeans to break the news that he's transgendered. When she sees Kayla onstage, does she greet her with open arms? Next, Carlie joins her sister and father. She says she wants her old dad back, but will she feel the same after seeing Kayla? Can the father-daughter bond be turned into a mother-daughter one? Be prepared for an emotional journey as two daughters struggle to understand how someone they loved so much could hurt them so badly.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: "Let me take a moment to read a few lines of a heartbreaking letter of a 10-year-old boy caught in the middle of an ugly, ugly custody battle between his parents" Dr. Phil says. He reads, “I'm bawling my eyes out with the tears of sadness. Dad, I never thought I would say this, but I always think that you're with another girl or sleeping with another girl. Question for dad: Mom says she still loves you and misses you. Do you still love her? Put a check in one of the boxes: yes or no.”

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Cherylyn says she loves living the high life and admits she is a spoiled and entitled“princess”who has spent tens of thousands of other people’s money on her lavish lifestyle. Cherylyn says she maxed out her 19 credit cards on designer shoes, handbags, purses, clothes, makeup and pampering! And, Cherylyn says she insists on fine dining, fast cars and her boyfriend, Tyler, footing the bill. However, Tyler says he has nothing more to give Cherylyn except an ultimatum, which he delivers when he comes face-to-face with her onstage. Cherylyn's mom, Joey, says that her selfish and manipulative daughter has blown over $130,000 in less than a year and her spending has left a trail of devastation which includes pawning over $7,000 worth of family heirlooms and stealing her identity. Sparks fly when Cherylyn defends her entitled behavior during the taping. What jaw-dropping statement does an unrepentant Cherylyn make to Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman accused her ex-husband of molesting her daughter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents: If your teen talks back, acts out or is just plain rude, you better tune in!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is there something you’ve been hanging on to for just a little too long? Clothes you haven’t fit into since high school? Boxes of stuff you haven’t looked at in years? Dr. Phil’s guests say their loved ones need to call the junk yard and “Get rid of it!” Kim says her husband, Paul’s, Star Warshobby has to go. With over 6,000 pieces in his collection, Paul spends 30 hours a week playing with his action figures, building models and talking to friends about Star Wars. He even had a light saber sword fight at their wedding, so shouldn’t Kim have known what she was getting into? Next, Larry and Sheila married four months ago, but Sheila says she had no idea she was getting hitched to a hoarder. Larry says she’s got it all wrong -– she’s the pack rat! With some of their favorite collections rolled out on stage, can Dr. Phil help them negotiate what goes and what stays? Plus, meet Terri, who has four storage units and two garages full of sentimental memories -– like a rubber chicken and her father’s spine X-rays! She spends so much money storing her stuff, that she can’t even afford health insurance. What’s at the heart of her hoarding? Don’t miss this hilarious look at how collections can get out of control!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From marital spats to parenting disagreements, learn the biggest mistakes you're making.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are concerned about the extreme measures their daughters take to get and keep a boyfriend.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In part one, viewers met 21-year-old Bailey who says she has the greatest love story of the century. She says she met Jasmine on social media eight months ago and that it was love at first post. She says they’ve been communicating day and night but have never spoken on the phone and have never met. When Dr. Phil first tried to talk to Bailey, she became insistent that her mother, Ericka, not participate in the show, and Bailey angrily walked off the stage. Bailey decided to come back to tell Dr. Phil she wants to meet Jasmine for the first time because she has something important to tell her. Will Dr. Phil allow Bailey to meet the target of her obsession?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Christina, who emailed him desperate for help for her daughter, Tara, who she says can be an angry monster. Christina left the home when Tara was 13 years old, but now, she says she's worried that her daughter is in a toxic situation with the ex-husband she calls narcissistic and his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Today, meet the new wife and find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did a woman accused of fake pregnancies really lie?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you ever feel nervous before posting on social media? Have you ever censored your own thoughts because you worry that you could be criticized or even canceled for posting your beliefs? Dr. Phil and his guests discuss the self-censorship debate on the internet and social media, including the fundamental misunderstanding about the true extent of “freedom of speech” under the First Amendment. Kimberly, a University of Tennessee doctoral candidate, claims her college violated her freedom of speech after a professional conduct committee determined that she had posted unprofessional content to her social media. What rights do colleges have to spy on personal social media posts? Also Tehran Von Ghasri, a comedian who performs on college campuses, says cancel culture gone too far. How does the fear of being canceled affects the jokes he performs for college students or content he posts online? Alexandra, a social media influencer and business owner, says giving opinions about COVID got her censored and three accounts closed. What did she say to get canceled? Dr. Phil also talks with Attorney Robert Shibley, a Senior Fellow at the Foundation for Individual Rights and Expression (FIRE), who says over half of Americans are not saying how they feel for fear of offending others or being canceled. Jessica Levinson, an attorney and a Clinical Professor of Law at Loyola Law School, provides an explanation on the boundaries of the First Amendment. And, Gabrielle Gambrell, a Columbia University and NYU professor, says that social media sites are obligated to monitor hate and dangerous speech. Plus, find out which emojis you are probably using right now are deemed outdated or inappropriate!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a nosy loved one in your life snooping through your things, questioning your every move and driving you crazy? Dr. Phil has advice.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A racist man tries to change his ways. A man finds out he is biracial.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda says her husband of two years, Jeffrey, was recently caught in an online child sex sting and sentenced to five years in prison, yet she’s not sure if she should leave him. Why does she say she blames herself for what happened? And, hear from Amanda’s parents, Juliet and Timothy, who say they just want their daughter to move on. When Dr. Phil gives Amanda a harsh dose of reality, will she see the situation for what it is? Then, 18-year-old Seri says that two years ago, she fell in love with 26-year-old Hector, who convinced her to quit school and become a prostitute — and give him all the profits. Hector was convicted of sexual assault of a child and is now serving up to 30 years in prison. Seri is raising their daughter and has a new boyfriend, Will, but she admits that she would consider taking Hector back, if given the opportunity. Why does Seri say she still has feelings for her abuser?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The saga of a father's quest for his vanished daughter is discussed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marcy and Scott say they believe their daughter, Danielle, has Stockholm syndrome from her boyfriend, Justin. They claim Justin is an abusive narcissist who has manipulated their daughter into believing he’s “God’s gift to the world.” Danielle says she loves Justin, and he’s not going anywhere. She says the only reason Justin has ever laid hands on her is to restrain her from her own angry rages, and her parents don’t understand their relationship. Justin says he’s a great guy with an “X factor” and doesn’t understand why Danielle’s parents dislike him. Although he’s currently dealing with a serious legal problem, he says he’s not a criminal, narcissist, or an abuser. And, in a shocking twist, Danielle reveals to Dr.Phil and her parents a secret about her relationship with Justin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil wants a violent teen to meet someone who could change her life. How will she react?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, will your financial problems be solved or can the money be more trouble than it’s worth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Craig and Cherie say the last half of their 16-year marriage has been anything but happily-ever-after. Cherie says Craig is chauvinistic, verbally abusive and demands sex, which she admits she only gives him about three to four times a year. Craig says Cherie withholds sex to control him, and as a result, he has become a slave to his anger. Cherie fears the tension in their household is taking a toll on their 11-year-old daughter, who is often caught in the crossfire of their fighting. Dr. Phil challenges the couple to a communication test. Can they heal their wounds and rekindle their romance? Then, meet the couple who inspired the movie, The Vow. Shortly after Kim and Krickitt Carpenter were married, a terrible car crash changed everything. Krickitt lay in a coma for weeks, and awoke with no recognition of her husband. The couple shares their inspiring, though oftentimes heartbreaking, journey of falling in love all over again. How did they find their way back to each other? And what is it like seeing their lives played out on the big screen? If you’ve ever wondered whether love can survive the toughest of challenges, you won’t want to miss this show! This show contains strong sexual content. Viewer discretion advised.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Living with an alcoholic parent is one of the most difficult and heart-wrenching experiences a child can go through. Heather, 28, and Alexandra, 21, say their mother, Joey, is a pathetic drunk, and if she doesn't get clean once and for all, they will walk away from her forever.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle says that her husband of nearly 10 years, John, has been living a secret life -- reaching out to men on Craigslist for sex and looking at child pornography. John insists that the child porn was accidentally downloaded, and while he admits to exchanging emails with men online, he maintains that he never met up with anyone in person. How does he explain his actions? And, what will the results of a polygraph test reveal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sixty-four-year-old Josie says she met the love of her life, Victor, on Facebook. Even though he’s Nigerian, 30 years younger, and she’s never physically met him, she insists it’s true love. She’s purchased a ticket to Nigeria and hopes to marry Victor, but her older sister, Carmen, her best friend, Angela, and her 19-year-old son, Anthony, say Josie is acting like a teenage fool. They believe Victor is conning Josie into marrying him for a green card. Dr. Phil took cameras to Nigeria to find Victor to see if he’s telling Josie the truth. Josie’s family says they want Dr. Phil to convince Josie that this relationship will never work. Is Victor who he says he is, and will Josie leave for Nigeria after hearing what Dr. Phil has to say?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A mother says her teen daughter is aggressive, violent and a bully who crossed a line when she threatened to shoot her teacher and other students.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.

programme.title: Para Toda la Vida
programme.desc: Una madre lucha por cuidar a su bebé, mientras el padre se aleja de ellos.

programme.title: Una novia muy especial
programme.desc: Comedia romántica acerca de dos amigos de la infancia que se reúnen despues de muchos años. Uno de ellos le pide al otro que finja ser judío para conquistar a una chica judía.

programme.title: Lejos de la tierra quemada
programme.desc: Ópera prima de Guillermo Arriaga como director después de los magníficos guiones de Amores perros, 21 gramos y Babel. Cuatro intensas historias en torno al amor, las relaciones clandestinas, los accidentes y la muerte que se cruzan entre sí.

programme.title: Para Toda la Vida
programme.desc: Una madre lucha por cuidar a su bebé, mientras el padre se aleja de ellos.

programme.title: Me Quiere, No Me Quiere
programme.desc: Un cínico mujeriego vuelve a casa por vacaciones, sólo para enredarse con la mujer que le rompió el corazón años atrás.

programme.title: La Ola Perfecta
programme.desc: ¿Podrías encontrar a tu amor verdadero haciendo surf?

programme.title: Eva
programme.desc: Un guionista teatral toma refugio en un chalet durante una violenta nevada, donde conoce a una misteriosa mujer

programme.title: Para Toda la Vida
programme.desc: Una madre lucha por cuidar a su bebé, mientras el padre se aleja de ellos.

programme.desc: Comedia romántica acerca de dos amigos de la infancia que se reúnen despues de muchos años. Uno de ellos le pide al otro que finja ser judío para conquistar a una chica judía.

programme.desc: Ópera prima de Guillermo Arriaga como director después de los magníficos guiones de Amores perros, 21 gramos y Babel. Cuatro intensas historias en torno al amor, las relaciones clandestinas, los accidentes y la muerte que se cruzan entre sí.

programme.title: Para Toda la Vida
programme.desc: Una madre lucha por cuidar a su bebé, mientras el padre se aleja de ellos.

programme.title: La Ola Perfecta
programme.desc: ¿Podrías encontrar a tu amor verdadero haciendo surf?

programme.title: Eva
programme.desc: Un guionista teatral toma refugio en un chalet durante una violenta nevada, donde conoce a una misteriosa mujer

programme.title: Nunca Es Tarde Para Enamorarse
programme.desc: Dustin Hoffman da vida a Harvey, un hombre que acaba de quedarse sin trabajo y que viaja a Londres para asistir a la boda de su hija. Para colmo de males, lo han alojado solo en un hotel, mientras el resto de la familia comparte una casa, y su hija quiere que sea su padrastro quien la lleve al altar. Pero conoce a Kate, una peculiar mujer que puede hacer que su viaje a Londres merezca la pena

programme.title: El problema con el muérdago
programme.desc: Willa Davis es propietaria de una tienda de mascotas en San Francisco. Un día se reencuentra con el chico que la dejó plantada en el instituto, y tendrá que luchar con todas sus fuerzas contra su propio corazón para no volver a enamorarse, diez años después.

programme.title: Tercera identidad
programme.desc: Años 60. Sally Cauffield (Sharon Stone) es una estadounidense casada con Leo Cauffield (Rupert Everett), un inglés que lleva una doble vida: es periodista y agente de la KGB. Cuando, tras varios años de matrimonio, Leo desaparece, Sally lo busca y cuando lo encuentra se entera de que es un espía cuyo nombre en clave es “El Tercer Hombre”.

programme.title: Amor Sin Tiempo
programme.desc: Megan parece tener la vida perfecta: una relación amorosa con un maravilloso esposo llamado Thomas y dos adorables hijos. Luego se encuentra despertando de un coma y descubre que no está y que nunca se ha casado. Thomas y los niños parecen no existir. Sus padres se preocupan por ella y Megan lucha por dejar de lado la realidad con la que soñaba.

programme.title: Navidad A La Vuelta De La Esquina
programme.desc: Claire, una experta capitalista de riesgo de la ciudad, escapa a un pueblo pintoresco durante las vacaciones y se convierte en invitada de la librería Fortenbury. A su llegada, Claire descubre que las celebraciones navideñas han sido canceladas después de una inundación y la librería está en muy mal estado.

programme.title: La promesa
programme.desc: En la Alemania de antes de la Primera Guerra Mundial, un joven se enamora de la esposa de su jefe, desatando un romance prohibido.

programme.title: Cariño, cuánto te odio
programme.desc: Dos compañeros de trabajo con una intensa rivalidad se ven obligados a colaborar, descubriendo que el odio y el amor están más cerca de lo que pensaban.

programme.title: Nunca Es Tarde Para Enamorarse
programme.desc: Dustin Hoffman da vida a Harvey, un hombre que acaba de quedarse sin trabajo y que viaja a Londres para asistir a la boda de su hija. Pero conoce a Kate, una peculiar mujer que puede hacer que su viaje a Londres merezca la pena

A su llegada, Claire descubre que las celebraciones navideñas han sido canceladas después de una inundación y la librería está en muy mal estado.

programme.title: La promesa
programme.desc: En la Alemania de antes de la Primera Guerra Mundial, un joven se enamora de la esposa de su jefe, desatando un romance prohibido.

programme.title: Cariño, cuánto te odio
programme.desc: Dos compañeros de trabajo con una intensa rivalidad se ven obligados a colaborar, descubriendo que el odio y el amor están más cerca de lo que pensaban.

programme.title: Juegos de la Vida
programme.desc: Una pareja de pocos recursos económicos en un barrio habanero acuerda hacerse un regalo en su aniversario.

programme.title: Recuerdos De Navidad
programme.desc: Después de años de vivir bajo la excesiva obsesión navideña de su madre, Noelle abandonó la Navidad y comenzó un nuevo capítulo en su vida al mudarse a la ciudad para concentrarse en su carrera. Convirtiéndose en una adicta al trabajo, su jefe la obliga a tomar un descanso para irse a casa y disfrutar de la temporada navideña.

programme.title: Una novia muy especial
programme.desc: Comedia romántica acerca de dos amigos de la infancia que se reúnen despues de muchos años. Uno de ellos le pide al otro que finja ser judío para conquistar a una chica judía.

programme.title: Tiene Que Ser Amor
programme.desc: Durante las fiestas entre Navidad y Año Nuevo, tres hermanas viajan a la encantadora ciudad de Sopot para replantearse su vida amorosa. Todo cambia cuando sus exnovios aparecen buscando una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Todos los días
programme.desc: Este día no es muy diferente al resto de los días de Ned, sólo que hoy su hijo Jonah quiere ir a una fiesta universitaria, su mujer va a traer a casa a su anciano padre para vivir con ellos, y su jefe parece haberse vuelto más loco y exigente de lo normal. Si puede soportar un día como el de hoy, Ned podrá aguantar cualquier cosa que le depare su vida.

programme.title: Las Seductoras
programme.desc: Max y su hija Page son dos timadoras profesionales que utilizan sus dotes de seducción para estafar a millonarios. Pero, en una ocasión, mientras Max intenta embaucar a un excéntrico magnate del tabaco, Page conoce a un simpático chico y se enamora de él.

programme.title: Mis Dos Amores
programme.desc: Leonard (Joaquin Phoenix), un soltero que ha regresado al piso de sus padres en Brooklyn, empieza a salir con Sandra (Vinessa Shaw), una joven encantadora con la que el matrimonio parece cercano. Pero aparece en su vida una nueva vecina, Michelle (Gwyneth Paltrow), tan bella como voluble, de la que se enamora locamente, lo que no hace sino empezar a complicar la tranquila vida que se le planteaba… Festival de Cannes 2008, Nominada a la Palma de Oro. Premios César 2009, Nominada la Mejor Película Extranjera. Premio Sant Jordi 2011 al Mejor Actor Extranjero (Joaquin Phoenix).
